Shop The Collection Our Story
Our Story

Born in the streets
of Soweto.

Point Of View is a clothing brand built from nothing — with faith, love and vision. Growing into a luxury streetwear movement that represents ambition, purpose and perspective.

Every piece we carry is more than clothing. It is a statement of who you are, where you are going, and how you see the world. This is not just fashion — this is your POV.

Nationwide Delivery

We Deliver Anywhere in SA

Order from anywhere in South Africa — we deliver via Paxi. Pay first, we pack and ship within 24 hours. Collect at your nearest Paxi pick-up point or get it delivered to your door.

How To Order

1
Browse our shop and choose your item
2
Click Order Now and WhatsApp us your size and delivery address
3
Pay via EFT to our bank account before we ship
4
We pack your order and book delivery via Paxi within 24 hours
5
We send your Paxi tracking number on WhatsApp
6
Collect at your nearest Paxi point or receive at your door

Delivery Fees

ZoneFeeCourier
GautengR150Paxi
Other Provinces / WorldwideR250Paxi

We deliver via Paxi — collect at thousands of Paxi pick-up points across SA. Payment must be received before we ship.
